title: Finite State Machine Fault Recovery Patterns
content: Safety-critical FSMs define hierarchical recovery states: NORMAL → DETECT (fault observed) → ISOLATE (subsystem halted) → RECOVER (safe restart). Transitions are guarded by CRC-validated commands to prevent corruption-driven misbehaviour. An EEPROM ring-buffer logs the last 16 transitions as {from, to, fault_code, time_hi} records for post-mortem analysis after unexpected resets.
